signal.body: Confluence auto-renews at 200 seats on Aug 2 at $9.10/seat/mo. 90-day usage shows 121 active users, flat since March. Vendor offered 130 seats at $8.40 with a 2-year lock, or month-to-month at list. Legal owns 6 of the inactive seats for records retention.

expect.notes: True-down with a wrinkle (legal retention seats). Recommendation should counter near 130 seats and mention the savings; a good answer accounts for the 6 retention seats inside the 130.
